attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 AMS (Autoimmune Mild Severity) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all AMS casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-03-00219 — SEQ derived from source AMS-019; ingest --reseq will assign the real globally-unique sequence within the SPEC-DERM-03 bucket.

Difficulty tier set to red_herring_laden: the recent penicillin course and the patient's fear of an antibiotic allergy are deliberate anchoring red herrings over a benign post-streptococcal diagnosis.
Age inferred as adult (32) from 68 kg body weight and adult presentation — the source note gives no age; please confirm on clinician review.
Sex_at_birth inferred as female — the source note does not state sex; arbitrary inference flagged for clinician confirmation (does not affect the clinical reasoning).

Telehealth reprojection applied: clinician-measured vitals, fine silvery scale, cervical lymphadenopathy, auscultation and the clinician-confirmed negative glass test are sealed in nodes 10/11 as physical signs; patient-observable rash description, a patient-performed glass test, self-reported afebrile status and weight are placed in 01.objective_data_offered as unverified.

Medication: the source prescribed a 'mild topical corticosteroid' with no named agent, strength or dose — recorded generically with no dose_route_frequency (no dose invented); a low-potency example (hydrocortisone 1%) is named only in the rationale for the reviewing prescriber. No AMT/PBS code asserted for the unnamed steroid.

Baseline tier T1 (routine in-person GP review) reflects a benign mild eruption AFTER the emergency mimics are screened out; mandatory red-flag escalation edges to T5 (anaphylaxis; non-blanching rash + fever/meningococcaemia) and T3 (pustulation / acute severe arthritis) are retained.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
